content: Hey, I'm Frankie, and I'm a Robotics Researcher at MIT. I just moved to Raleigh, NC, and I'm excited to explore the area.
Hi Frankie, welcome to Raleigh! What brought you to the area, and what are you working on in your research?
I'm working on a project to develop more advanced robotic limbs, and I'm collaborating with a team at MIT. I'm also loving the food scene in Raleigh, especially the Japanese cuisine at Bida Manda.
Bida Manda is a great spot! Have you tried any other restaurants in the area, and do you have a favorite type of Japanese food?
I'm a big fan of ramen, and I've been trying to find the best spot in Raleigh. I've also been exploring the local photography scene and taking my camera with me on hikes.
Photography is a great hobby! Are you using a specific type of camera, and do you have a favorite location to shoot in the Raleigh area?
I'm using a Nikon D850, and I love shooting at the Neuse River Greenway Trail. I've also been trying to get into surfing, and I've been looking for a good spot to catch some waves.
The Neuse River Greenway Trail is a beautiful spot! Have you found a good surf spot in the area, and are you taking any lessons or going with a group?
I've been looking into surfing lessons at the Wrightsville Beach Surf School, and I'm hoping to start next month. I've also been trying to prioritize my time and balance my work and hobbies.
That's great, Frankie! It's wonderful that you're making time for your hobbies and interests. How do you like living in Raleigh so far, and have you met any new people or made any friends?
I'm loving it, the people are so friendly! I've met some great colleagues at MIT, and I've also been hanging out with my neighbor, Alex, who's into mountain biking.
Mountain biking is a great way to explore the area! Have you thought about joining any local groups or clubs to meet more people with similar interests?
I've been looking into the Raleigh Mountain Bike Club, and I'm thinking of joining their next ride on April 10th. I've also been experimenting with home brewing beer and trying out new recipes.
Home brewing is a fun hobby! What kind of beers are you making, and do you have a favorite recipe or style?
I'm a big fan of IPAs, and I've been trying to perfect my recipe. I've also been thinking about starting a blog to document my brewing adventures and share my recipes with others.
A blog is a great idea! Have you thought about where you'll be brewing, and do you have a dedicated space for your equipment?

I've been brewing in my garage, and I'm thinking of setting up a dedicated brewery space soon. I've also been trying to prioritize my time and make sure I have enough space for my border collie, Ziggy.
Ziggy is a lucky dog! Don't forget to take care of yourself and prioritize your own needs, especially with all the exciting projects you have going on.
